name: staged_distribution_findings
title: Source-distribution findings (Track D, staged tier)
description: Per-finding rows from the Track D distribution audit. Pairs with staged_source_quality_findings — the two tables are mutually exclusive on the track column. Anchored to the 2026-04-26 v20d ETL spine checkpoint.

fields.name: issue
fields.description: Snake-case issue code in the source_distribution_* namespace. Digits allowed for sentinel / slice identifiers.

fields.name: evidence
fields.description: Free-form evidence string; may legitimately be empty for some findings.

fields.name: owner
fields.description: Optional owner attribution; null for unowned findings.
